textByHash.0f814ed9ac9e7e0e8af1c4afc75dff7b3b8b9e2f: The fifth barge crashed into the sixth.
textByHash.1015661244104af9a76b5bcdff7d6543c7b688f2: The second barge suffered from 'feature creep'. Senior museum staff stuck their oar in and added unnecessary features: 'go-faster stripes', a portable fossil centrifuge and a walk-on mini-museum.
textByHash.119f39af6c08af1d41086622bde5cb9715cae44e: The third barge made it out to sea, but a special sealant was used that attracted sea monsters. They didn't make it very far.
textByHash.1383bd7eb405f5afbb2afcba376b2c5c54726861: Well, you may be aware of the previous attempts at this expedition?
textByHash.18df880f574e0764eacf7e423455e6744a96ff4e: My head... What happened? I thought we were going to set off on our voyage?
textByHash.30cc0019515e00ea39a43ce357c0b207a611ab72: Welcome back. Any luck finding a way for us to make it through this cursed voyage?
textByHash.3ad54c0a34d2aaeeb256e057f6a58a88f65e23a1: Needless to say, it had... buoyancy issues.
textByHash.42c744b1233d71ac17d60d08ad5c1548f6e21038: Oh quiet, boy - you shouldn't believe in such nonsense.
textByHash.4dd9a50c50b82b9853b87eab934d5ca94a60fa60: Well I'm certainly not putting my crew's life in the hands of some lucky charm! I think I'll go with the potion.
textByHash.74a7aee7aac15b89cc70904bdd7bef40ef047065: The apothecary in Varrock might be able to help you out with that potion of sealegs, I'd start by paying him a visit.
textByHash.83a6835a1d62a5a3ce34937809cfcb7812cf1a2c: The fourth also used a special sealant, this one attracted icebergs.
textByHash.96d149d68d7ed906b54fee3509b5d617043e5d57: I've heard all kinds of stories at the Rusty Anchor Inn in Port Sarim. I'm sure you'll be able to find out something about cursed voyages if you ask around the folks there.
textByHash.9818bb82330f8b4f6dc397bbb394130104a6915e: Good, because we're going to need your help if we're ever going out on this voyage.
textByHash.9bca4faf6a9a380d5432116cb8a8339bd32a225e: Hello, I'm the lead navigator on the expedition, I take it you're here to help us out?
textByHash.9ff59a7973dea549eefcf3402e339787448fde4d: We're ready to go when you are.
textByHash.aa482e80fa5afb6e27cbe9f5a4a64ce6c2a1dd86: The ninth version was built using magic logs. The barge gained some form of rudimentary sentience. It developed serious depression and ran itself aground near Crandor.
textByHash.aa55081ea1b6e71ca5cd25623a87861898b80b57: Well, the first barge had some serious design flaws... it didn't float.
textByHash.b01ae145feb4bf0dd9270bc12f35cac82e9f7796: Looks like we've got everything we need to set off!
textByHash.bd12990750404abfd7b3ee0b3cf89cca03d8b2c8: The apothecary in Varrock might be able to help you out, you should pay him a visit.
textByHash.bd40ebcc8839308f3b45f50c97ba6b9494484b7d: Well, , whether you believe it or not, know that none of my men will be going on this expedition unless you can ensure our safety from the curse.
textByHash.c0d9ce95642137c04a69b601441b662d4942ca0c: So, now do you understand why we need your help?
textByHash.cb899fa86d8a6b38fbc3f91b23782a9755813bf2: Any luck getting your hands on that potion of sealegs?
textByHash.d2c8716e548e36731012f3688c50a674b445dc6b: The eighth barge is still here, we think. An accident involving a magical explosion and some talking anchovies means that it is now believed to reside 12 seconds out of phase.
textByHash.d89b85c41c8201af71edd60432cdb1db36e296d7: Would you like to travel to the Digsite?
textByHash.ddfd726028b6f2bc7b92dde41f334bf2d3d06b4d: Would you like to travel to Fossil Island?
textByHash.dfd6fb0e319acfe2e3dcf9d98be906c746329730: Well, are you ready to set off again? Let me know and I'll get the crew to take another dose of this potion of sealegs.
textByHash.e08e744b9ee6c1369607dcd32cbeaf687e48027b: Fine by me, as long as you get that potion.
textByHash.edd3c632deacfce27ac49eac0fa10da018973cc2: We're not the first crew to face a cursed voyage, perhaps someone who has experienced one before can give you some advice.
textByHash.fea1e3c90c65993ccc938f52d790f6bfb168f51c: Excellent work! I'm sure the crew will be very glad to hear about this.
